title: The Elf of the Forest
overview: Naoe has a strange last appointment booked for the day. The client's name is Elfuda and she comes from another dimension. Now, she needs some help.

title: The Dark Elf and the Beautiful Flower
overview: Erufuda isn’t the only person from another dimension worried about gaining a few pounds! She is shocked to discover Kuroeda, a dark elf, is also stranded in this world.

title: The Sweaty Ogre and the Turquoise Scales
overview: Naoe and Elfuda get ready to go to the sauna! Time to sweat off some pounds with a boosted metabolism! But rumor has it, an ogre is a regular at the sauna...

title: The Baron's Dog and the Floating Pig
overview: Elfuda shows Naoe the entrance to the alternate dimension where she entered his world. Then it’s back to running, but too much exertion can lead to injury!

title: The Empress of the Park and the Demonic Dinner
overview: While training at the park, Naoe and his friends encounter Kobo, who is snatching sweets from the local children! Kobo is worried about weight gain from eating too much candy.

title: The Hindsight Bones and the Snowy Dragon
overview: The gang unearths a whole person's worth of bones from underneath Naoe's bed! Time to put together a skeleton.

title: Potatoes of Shame and the Titan's Fist
overview: Elfuda receives a coupon for a year’s supply of free fries at a hamburger shop! However, it’s a trap!

title: Otherworldly Beings and Super Spicy Poses
overview: Naoe is worried that the people of the otherworld are not losing weight, so he takes his group to a hot yoga studio.

title: Kiddie Cure-all
overview: Kuroeda creates a suspicious potion using black magic and plans to have Elufuda drink it as an experiment.

title: The Affectionate Dog and the Dark Roast Plant
overview: Elfuda succumbs to temptation once again and gets some fries, but a doggone puppy runs up and steals them!

title: A Stagnating Dream
overview: A suspicious woman approaches Naoe and starts talking about delicious soft serve ice cream! She may have an unexpected connection to Elfuda.

title: The Beefy Soldier and Remnants of a Dream
overview: Naoe is worried about Ooeda's harsh regimen is taking its toll on Elfuda. He finally decides to intervene.
